//: Type-checks the React Native backend (backend.native.ts + its dev-time component stub) against the real @kontor/sdk-native wrapper. These files are excluded from the web build (they import a mobile-only peer), so this is where their `const _conforms: KontorBackend = native` assertion is verified — locally and in the mobile CI. Run: `npx tsc -p tsconfig.native.json`.
